details.test: Task 1: Book evening ACL evaluation at main clinic with BlueCare Plus
Task 2: Morning follow-up with Dr. Jordan Lee at downtown clinic
Task 3: Saturday plantar fasciitis assessment with top running specialist
Task 4: Purchase cheapest 5-session shoulder package with telehealth
Task 5: Reschedule Monday 3pm appointment to Thursday evening
Task 6: Same-day in-person ankle sprain eval within 10 miles of 94105 after 1pm
Task 7: Cheapest telehealth post-op rehab next Wednesday after 7pm
Task 8: Register for intermediate Return to Sport soccer class next month (weekday evening)
Task 9: Submit insurance benefits check for knee rehab (ActiveHealth Gold, text)
